metadata.title: RIO Terminal — Terminal Online | Sync Local Terminal
metadata.description: RIO Terminal is a terminal online that syncs with your local shell. Run zsh, npm, and git in the browser with a real PTY session.

home.title: RIO Terminal —
home.subtitle: A beautiful terminal online that syncs with your local zsh. Full PTY — run npm, git, and your daily workflow in the browser.

shell.title: Sync local terminal
shell.description: Real PTY session wired to your machine — not a mock shell.

fast.title: Terminal online
fast.description: Open from any browser. No install, instant access to your workspace.

simple.title: RIO Terminal
simple.description: Modern UI, themes, and animations — built for developers who live in the terminal.

workspace.notesSubtitle: Capture commands, output, and reminders from your terminal session.
workspace.placeholder:
Type notes here…

Tip: copy text from the terminal, then use “Paste from clipboard” or switch back to Terminal and click “Add to notes”.

appearance.title: Terminal appearance
appearance.subtitle: Themes, typography, cursor, and visual effects

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
